zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Richard Chamberlain II於1310年出生在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯波洛時，他的父親John Chamberlaine15歲，母親Joan Morteyn23歲。他於大約1327年與Mrs Margaret Chamberlain在英國貝德福爾結婚。他去世於1391年11月10日在英國英格蘭貝德福爾斯坦別利其享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Richard Chamberlain II于1310年出生在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾吉爾斯波洛时，他的父亲John Chamberlaine15岁，母亲Joan Morteyn23岁。他于大约1327年与Mrs Margaret Chamberlain在英国貝德福爾结婚。他去世于1391年11月10日在英国英格兰貝德福爾斯坦別利其享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: Chamberlain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status name from Old French chambrelain, Norman French cambrelanc, cambrelen(c) ‘chamberlain’ (of ancient Germanic origin, from kamer ‘chamber, room’, Latin camera (see Chambers ) + the diminutive suffix -(l)ing). This was originally the name of an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, but is so widespread in late medieval England that it must sometimes have been used of people of more ordinary status, perhaps as a nickname for an officious or self-important person or for someone who played the role of chamberlain in a folk play, tableau, or ceremony. Compare Chancellor for a possible similar usage.

variants.name: Chamberlin
meanings: French: occupational name for an official in charge of the private chambers of his master, from Old French chamberlenc ‘chamberlain’. See also Chamberlain and compare above.

variants.name: Chambers
meanings: from Middle English chaumbre ‘room (in a house); reception room in a palace or official building’ (Old French chambre). It is identical in implied function with the Chamberlain , which denoted an official: to pay in cameram was to pay into the exchequer, of which the camerarius or chamberer was in charge. The surname also applied to clerks employed there. As the office of Chamberlain rose in the social scale, this term remained reserved for more humble servants of the bedchamber or private quarters.
(of Norman origin): habitational name from Les Chambres, Manche (France).

nameMeanings.name: Richard
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the most enduringly successful of the Old French personal names introduced into Britain by the Normans. It is of Germanic (Frankish) origin, derived from rīc ‘power’ + hard ‘strong, hardy’. It has enjoyed continuous popularity in England from the Conquest to the present day, influenced by the fact that it was borne by three kings of England, in particular Richard I ( 1157–99 ). He was king for only ten years ( 1189–99 ), most of which he spent in warfare abroad, taking part in the Third Crusade and costing the people of England considerable sums in taxes. Nevertheless, he achieved the status of a folk hero, and was never in England long enough to disappoint popular faith in his goodness and justice. He was also Duke of Aquitaine and Normandy and Count of Anjou, fiefs which he held at a time of maximum English expansion in France. His exploits as a leader of the Third Crusade earned him the nickname ‘Coeur de Lion’ or ‘Lionheart’ and a permanent place in popular imagination, in which he was even more firmly enshrined by Sir Walter Scott's novel Ivanhoe ( 1820 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Richard Chamberlain II was born in 1310, in Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, John Chamberlaine, was 15 and his mother, Joan Morteyn, was 23. He married Mrs Margaret Chamberlain about 1327, in Bedfordshire, England. He died on 10 November 1391, in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Richard Chamberlain II est né en 1310, à Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Chamberlaine, avait 15 ans et sa mère, Joan Morteyn, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Mrs Margaret Chamberlain environ 1327, à Bedfordshire, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 10 novembre 1391, à Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 81 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Richard Chamberlain II 1310 in Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Chamberlaine 15 und seine Mutter Joan Morteyn 23. Er hat um 1327 in Bedfordshire, England Mrs Margaret Chamberlain geheiratet. Er starb am 10. November 1391 im Alter von 81 Jahren in Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Chamberlain II è nato il nel 1310 nel Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, John Chamberlaine, aveva 15 anni e il suo madre, Joan Morteyn, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Mrs Margaret Chamberlain circa 1327, nel Bedfordshire, England. Morì il 10 novembre 1391, nel Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 81 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Chamberlain IIが1310年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアグイルスボロウで生まれた時，父John Chamberlaineは15歳，母Joan Morteynは23歳であった。約1327年にイギリスベドフォードシュアイアでMrs Margaret Chamberlainと結婚した。彼は1391年11月10日にイギリスイギリスベドフォードシュアイアスタンブリッジで81歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Richard Chamberlain II(이)가 1310년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 길스버루그h에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Chamberlaine(은)는 15세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Morteyn(은)는 23세였다. 그는 대략 1327년 영국 베드퍼드실르에서 Mrs Margaret Chamberlain(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1391년 11월 10일 영국 잉글랜드 베드퍼드실르 스탠브리지에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Richard Chamberlain II nasceu em 1310, em Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John Chamberlaine, tinha 15 anos e sua mãe, Joan Morteyn, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Mrs Margaret Chamberlain aproximadamente 1327, em Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 10 de novembro de 1391, em Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Richard Chamberlain II родился в 1310 г. в местности гуилсбороую, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Chamberlaine было 15 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Morteyn, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Mrs Margaret Chamberlain около 1327 г. в местности бедфордшир, Англия. Он умер 10 ноября 1391 г. в местности станбридж, бедфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 81 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Richard Chamberlain II nació en 1310, en Guilsborough, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John Chamberlaine, tenía 15 años y su mamá, Joan Morteyn, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Mrs Margaret Chamberlain aproximadamente 1327, en Bedfordshire, Inglaterra. Murió el 10 de noviembre de 1391, en Stanbridge, Bedfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 81 años.
